YCAPS Past Speaker Jodi Schneider's Brief Comments for Bloomberg News

US Revokes Intel and Qualcomm Licenses to Sell Chips to Huawei

www.youtube.com/watch?v=K7wX...

#YCAPSExpert #UnitedStates #China #Semiconductor #Huawei

2️⃣ ASML and TSMC can remotely disable their advanced chip-making machines if China invades Taiwan, addressing US concerns over the potential impact on the global semiconductor industry.

By Diederik Baazil via Bloomberg
www.bloomberg.com/news/article...

I think it's wise to be cautious about how quickly China can catch up with semiconductor manufacture but given what they've achieved in the last 30 years it's absurd to be certain they *can't* catch up.

Given that only a a tiny fraction of CHIPS Act funding went to legacy semiconductor production, this is an admission of a strategic blunder rather than a justification for increasing US manufactures costs by 25%. 

FWIW, there are no non-Chinese substitutes for a substantial number of these chips.
